title: drypetes helferi
intro: Drypetes helferi, also known as the Helfer's drypetes, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Drypetes helferi include reducing fever and inflammation, as well as treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically dried and used to make teas or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
